final:
module clock_divider(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg clk_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            clk_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            clk_out <= ~clk_out;
        end
    end
endmodule
